label: 5536 Office equipment for House Members, officers, and committees

children.heading: Authority of Chief Administrative Officer
children.label: a Authority of Chief Administrative Officer
children.text: At the request of any Member, officer, or committee of the House of Representatives, or the Resident Commissioner from Puerto Rico, and with the approval of the Committee on House Oversight, but subject to the limitations prescribed by this Act, the Chief Administrative Officer of the House of Representatives shall furnish office equipment for use in the office of that Member, Resident Commissioner, officer, or committee. Office equipment so furnished is limited to equipment of those types and categories which the Committee on House Oversight shall prescribe.

children.heading: Registration and ownership
children.label: b Registration and ownership
children.text: Office equipment furnished under this section shall be registered in the office of the Chief Administrative Officer of the House of Representatives and shall remain the property of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Payment
children.label: c Payment
children.text: The cost of office equipment furnished under this section shall be paid from the applicable accounts of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Rules and regulations
children.label: d Rules and regulations
children.text: The Committee on House Oversight shall prescribe such regulations as it considers necessary to carry out the purposes of this section.
